summary: Tested Public Page Custom Slug Features: /:slug route access, 404 handling, referral code display, guest checkout flow, guest order API, 8% platform fee calculation, and order tracking. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PageCheckout.jsx line 59-62: Tax calculation uses fixed 8% rate - this matches the platform fee requirement but frontend labels it as 'Tax (8%)' which is the same as platform fee rate
seed_data_creation: Created test page 'testcheckout1770708670' with 2 products (Widget Pro, Gadget Plus) for checkout testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public page features all working: /:slug and /p/:slug routes both load pages, 404 shows for non-existent slugs, referral code displayed with Copy/Sign Up buttons, full checkout flow (3 steps) works without authentication, guest orders created successfully with 8% platform fee, order tracking works with phone verification.
